expectations.evidence: Uses for...of loop over links, sends one at a time. No Promise.all.
No withFloodWait wrapper. Bare sendTextMessage calls in both send-listener handleBroadcast and commands handleBroadcastCommand. No flood-wait.ts utility created.
No sleep/delay between sends in either the send-listener handler or the command handler.
try/catch per user with sent++/failed++ counters, continues to next user.
Created src/app/api/telegram/bot/broadcast/route.ts with admin auth, 4096-char limit, pg_notify.
